name: Sora
intro: Sora, the Shifting Cloud, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Mystic Surge
abilities.description: Buff Sora can ascend to Thunder or Torrent by using his Ultimate . After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of Cloudstep . At 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art. Thunder : Converts 30% Max HP into Physical Attack at 10% ratio, adopting an assassin style. Torrent : Converts each point of Physical Attack into 10 Max HP , adopting a tank style.
